completedWork: Kirchhoff's Laws Solver - NEW: Complete circuit analysis tool with KVL (series), KCL (parallel nodes), and Mesh Analysis (two-loop). Interactive SVG diagrams, real-time validation, step-by-step solutions, and comprehensive educational content on circuit analysis methods.

Switched Capacitor Filter - NEW: Advanced simulation of analog/digital hybrid filtering with charge transfer animation at 60fps, two-phase switching visualization (Φ₁/Φ₂), live Bode plot, adjustable parameters (clock freq, capacitors, input freq), voltage waveform comparison, and emulated resistance calculations.
